title: Rael PvP
description: A Orange themed Ressourcepack for PvP and SMP
body:
# 📦 Rael PvP

**Rael PvP** is a clean **PvP & SMP texture pack** made for **smooth gameplay**, **clear visuals**, and **competitive fights**.  
Built for **Minecraft 1.21+**, it combines **orange**, **modern style**, and **maximum clarity** to give every hit and combo the perfect look. 


## 📋 Full Feature List and Credits


<details>
<summary>Features & Credits</summary>

## Features
Visible Shield Cooldown, Orange Sweep Particles, Orange Crit Particles, OG-Style Netherite Armor, Golden Crowns Helmet, No Vignette, No Spyglass Overlay, No Pumpkin Blur, No Nausea, Orange Enchantment Glint, Short PvP Swords, Orange Slime Spawn Egg, Orange Slime Ball, Unique Dye Textures, Old Style Netherite Armor Item, Golden Crown Helmet Item, Golden Apple Smiley, Orange Elytra, OG Diamond Armor Item, Crossbow & Bow Pull Indicator, Title Screen Raelcraft Logo, Strideys Homescreen Background, Colored Ping Display, Crosshair dot, Steak Hunger Bars, Orange Hotbar Selector, Golden Armor Bars, Transparent White Hotbar & Offhand, Orange XP Bar, Orange Hearts, Cubic Sun & Moon, No Fishing Hook, Orange Slime Mob, Smoother Wool, Orange Slime Block, Orange Sticky Piston, Powder Snow Red Edge, Better Scaffolding, Orange Nether Portal, Low Fire, Blue Ancient Debris, No Explosion Particles, Orange Color Properties, Small Totem, Small Side Shield, 3D Mace, Cobweb Outlines, PvP Lang File, pack.png, Red Trapped Chest, Blue Full Grown Nether Wart, Glass Bottom Boat, Enchanted Mace CIT Textures, Knockback sword cit textures, connected ore textures with border

## Credits
Crossbow & Bow Pull Indicator – https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp  

Blue Ancient Debris – https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blue-netherite   

Cobweb Outlines – https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/web  

Red Trapped Chest – https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/red-trapped-chests 

CTM Ore borders - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ctm-ore-borders

Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net

</details>



### Author

Made with 🧡 by [raelmc](https://modrinth.com/user/raelmc)
